panels.description:
All instances among pgsql cluster ${cluster}

Instance: Goto PGSQL Instance

IP: Goto PGSQL Node

Status: Goto PGSQL Service

Load: max(cpu,postgres,pgbouncer)

Space: Disk space usage max(all device)

Proxy: session number, Goto Haproxy Admin Page
panels.title: Postgres Instances

panels.description: Idle in Transaction backend number of all databases in this instance.
panels.title: Idle in Transaction Backends

panels.description: Group by pg_stat_activity.state on instance level
panels.title: Backends by State

panels.description: Backend number group by backend type in this instance.
panels.title: Backends by Type

panels.description: max by pg_stat_activity connection duration on instance level
panels.title: Max Conn Lifespan

panels.description: Group by pg_stat_activity.wait_event_type on instance level
panels.title: Backends by Wait Event Type

panels.description: max by pg_stat_activity transaction duration on instance level
panels.title: Long Lived Xact (Max Xact Lifespan)

panels.description:
Newly established session on each database.
Increase number of last 1 minute
panels.title: New Sessions (increase1m)

panels.title: Active Time

panels.title: Idle in Xact Time

panels.title: Session Time (avg by backend)

panels.title: Active Time (avg by backend)

panels.description: Database in Pgbouncer of this instance ${instance}

targets.expr: sum by (datname) (pgbouncer_database_current_connections{instance="$instance", datname!="pgbouncer"}) / sum by (datname) (pgbouncer_database_max_connections{instance="$instance", datname!="pgbouncer"})

panels.title: Databases in Pgbouncer

panels.description: New Conn Rate/s in last Minute: Number of assignment for server assigned to client
panels.title: Pgbouncer Servers & Clients

panels.description: New Conn Rate/s in last Minute: Number of assignment for server assigned to client
panels.title: Pgbouncer Server Assignment Rate

list.description: IP address of this postgres instance
list.label: IP
list.name: ip

list.description: Sequence number of this instance, which is an unique integer among a postgres cluster
list.label: Sequence
list.name: seq

list.description: Cluster identifier for this postgres instance, cluster should be unique among entire environment. such as pg-meta, pg-test
list.label: Cluster
list.name: cluster

list.description: Node name of current postgres instance
list.label: Node
list.name: node
